property.name: CONSOLE_PATTERN
property.value: %d{yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSXXX} level=%-5level app=${appName} thread=%thread logger=%logger{36} requestId=%X{requestId:-} userId=%X{userId:-} messageId=%X{messageId:-} runId=%X{runId:-} agentId=%X{agentId:-} toolName=%X{toolName:-} httpMethod=%X{httpMethod:-} httpPath=%X{httpPath:-} %msg%n%ex
